metadata.title: explore-design
metadata.description: Improve and refine the technical approach for an issue or OpenSpec change after initial specification before implementation.

command.goal:
Improve and refine the technical approach for an issue or OpenSpec change after initial specification before implementation.
## Usage
/explore-design <issue|openspec-change>
## Accepted Inputs
- Issue or user story - OpenSpec change with unresolved technical approaches or design gaps - Existing architecture context and constraints - Relevant requirements, ADRs, or technical notes linked to the issue or change
## Owning Agent
@robot-architect
## Associated Skills
- `051-design-two-steps-methods` - `056-design-avoid-breaking-changes` - `057-design-feature-toggles`
## Workflow position
Runs after `/create-spec`, not as the first mission in the workflow.

step.step-content: Clarify goals, constraints, assumptions, and success criteria.
Recommend a direction and refine OpenSpec artifacts when provided.

safeguards-list.safeguards-item: Do not treat recommendations as approved until user confirmation.
Do not apply 042-planning-openspec in this command.
